dsl_rule.translation_notes: Pattern detection based on 8-day formation not directly available as indicator. Approximated entry conditions: (1) closing lower than previous (black candle), (2) higher high than previous (confirming higher high), (3) body is negative (black/bearish candle). Exit condition is a simple reversal (close above previous close). The 8-day lookback period and measure rule for target calculation would require custom pattern logic beyond standard indicators. Stop loss set conservatively at 3% given the pattern-based nature and high volatility of breakout trades.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: New Price Lines (8-day formation). Entry signal when price reverses strongly from bottom (point A) and advances rapidly over 8 days, then encounters overhead resistance where the last candle turns black, followed by another black candle that makes a higher high but closes lower, confirming a downward breakout.
